scripts.dump-nyc-pw: mkdir -p ../.nyc_output && npx playwright test --config ../playwright/playwright.config.ts playwright/tests/framework --project='live chromium' && mv coverage/playwright/coverage-final.json ../.nyc_output/framework-playwright.json
scripts.build: npm run clean && vite build && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 tsc --project tsconfig.production.json
scripts.test: npm run eslint && npm run prettier && npm run tsc && npm run vitest
